items.name: Orange Prisoner Jumpsuit (INMATE Teddy)
items.description:
Stand out in the yard with this bold American prisoner coverall 🔥

Featuring a detailed INMATE design, authentic prison number, and a unique gangsta teddy back graphic that adds a rebellious street vibe.

Perfect for prison roleplay, edgy avatars, street style, and dark aesthetics.

✔ High detail texture
✔ Realistic coverall fit
✔ Unique back graphic (exclusive style)
✔ Designed to stand out in any game

Upgrade your avatar and dominate the prison yard. 🧡
